arts.ttl: Barcelona offer Chelsea two cracks for Enzo Fernandez
arts.sum: Chelsea are set to be offered a tempting opportunity to offload Enzo Fernandez to Barcelona, with the possibility of receiving two players in return. The Spanish source reports that the Blaugrana are poised to offer Maresca’s side both Frenkie de Jong and Ferran Torres as part of the deal.

arts.ttl: Toni Fernández: Pushed by cousin Guille the latest Barca talent is ready to shine
arts.sum: La Masia is once again the benchmark for developing top talents. After a few years without developing a player, the academy has churned out Lamine Yamal, Pau Cubarsí, and Marc...

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Borussia Dortmund-Barcelona: All guns blazing for Hansi Flick against pacy attack
arts.sum: Barcelona face Borussia Dortmund at the Sinal Iduna Park on Wednesday night (21:00 CEST), knowing that a win will see them move within a couple of points of qualification in the top eight of the Champions League. arts.ttl: Barcelona Sporting Director Deco has three names in mind for right-back position
arts.sum: Barcelona Sporting Director Deco is already working on next summer’s business, with none expected in January. He will once again be doing so without any certainty on what finances will be available. According to Sport, the focus of his scouting work is currently the full-back positions. The Blaugrana feel they could improve on Gerard Martin […] The post Barcelona Sporting Director Deco has three names in mind for right-back position appeared first on Football España.

arts.sum: Qualification is up for grabs between the two European heavyweights

arts.ttl: Mourinho tells Real Madrid to sign a better Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: Now Mourinho has claimed that he is better than Lamine Yamal, the 17-year-old sensation who has taken Barcelona and world football by storm over the course of the last 18 months – and the Portuguese hopes he hooks up with Carlo Ancelotti’s Real Madrid ahead of Barca. Jose Mourinho has told his old club Real Madrid that they should move for a better version of Lamine Yamal .

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Borussia Dortmund: UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: Barcelona will visit Borussia Dortmund in a battle between two teams in the direct qualification places in the UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: Barcelona looking for a left-back as Alphonso Davies option fades
arts.sum: FC Barcelona is looking for a new left-back, but it likely won’t be Alphonso Davies as previously rumored. In the future, Barcelona will need to look at how their young players are developing and may be forced to spend money to find a solution at this position.

arts.ttl: “He is unique” – Jose Mourinho calls on former club Real Madrid to sign Barcelona target
arts.sum: On Wednesday, Jose Mourinho will be re-united with Spanish opposition as his Fenerbahce side prepare to take on Athletic Club in the Europa League.
